reviews.comment:
YPF - ACA Choele Choel. Buen servicio. Agradable y surtido full (AM-PM). Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
YPF - ACA Choele Choel. Good service. Pleasant and fully stocked (AM-PM). Good customer service.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, en playa y en el minishopping

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, both on the beach and in the mini-shopping center.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio pero no pude pagar con la aplicación teniendo fondos me daba error. Supongo que no hizo bien el procedimiento el playero y me perjudico. En estos casos la culpa la tiene el cliente, Siempre

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, but I couldn't pay with the app even though I had funds; it kept giving me an error. I suppose the attendant didn't follow the procedure correctly and it affected my payment. In these cases, it's always the customer's fault.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4M19MSG9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena estación, no había demora en la espera para cargar nafta.
El market bastante completo.
Los baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
Good station, no wait to fill up.
The convenience store is quite well-stocked.
The restrooms are clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4ODVxUFJ3EAE

reviewer.displayName: en la casita tengo un amor que me está esperando

reviews.comment:
Siempre paso cuando viajo
Podes tomar mate tranqui
Y la atención es muy buena ,además los baños limpios 😝

(Translated by Google)
I always stop by when I travel.
You can have mate in peace.
And the service is great, plus the bathrooms are clean. 😝
